content.text:
<user_query>
Explore omega_workspace/workspace/OmegA-Next/chyren-web for obvious remaining tasks: TODO comments, missing env vars, incomplete features, failing tests, deployment scripts, API routes. Return top 10 actionable remaining items.
</user_query>

Got it. I’m going to scan `chyren-web` for high-signal “unfinished” markers (TODO/FIXME/XXX), placeholder env usage, stubbed routes/actions, and deployment/script gaps—then I’ll consolidate the **top 10 most actionable** items with exact file/line references.

Next I’ll open the key config + API route files and scan for “not configured” guards, empty API-key fallbacks, local-default URLs, and any scripts that look incomplete or missing from deployment flow.

input.pattern: not configured|not implemented|unsupported|unimplemented|return new Response\(.+501|throw new Error\(|console\.log\(

content.text: Now I’ll inspect the Neon context pipeline (generation + runtime fetch), the main page’s client-side calls, and deployment/runtime files (Dockerfile/vercel.json) to surface concrete “fix/finish this” items with precise locations.
